DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BENJAMIN VAHEDY'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENA AND FOR EXPENSES OF THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 20TH, 2012 TO GIVE MOVANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. NO LATER THAN 4 P.M., NOVEMBER 13TH, MOVANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE OF NOVEMBER 20TH, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Henry Wirta, Harrington Foxx Dubrow & Canter, 415.288.6600, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Daniel O'Neill, Law Office of Daniel O'Neill, 805.542.0639, appearing for the Defendant.

Ruling: A R G U E D; The Motion To Quash Subpoena And For Expenses Of The Motion is DENIED. The prevailing party is to prepare the order. James Watson, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena And For Expenses Of The Motion - Exhibits In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT BENJAMIN VAHEDY'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoena And For Expenses Of The Motion is continued to November 20th, 2012 to give movant the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No later than 4 p.m., November 13th, movant must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date of November 20th, or the motion will be denied. Ernst Halperin, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
